hindi: मातु लक्ष्मी करि कृपा, करो हृदय में वास। मनोकामना सिद्ध करि, परुवहु मेरी आस॥
english: O Mother Lakshmi, be gracious, dwell in my heart; fulfil my desires and complete my hopes
roman: Matu Lakshmi Kari Kripa, Karo Hriday Mein Vaas, Manokamna Siddh Kari, Paruvahu Meri Aas

hindi: यही मोर अरदास, हाथ जोड़ विनती करुं। सब विधि करौ सुवास, जय जननि जगदम्बिका॥
english: This is my only prayer, I bow with folded hands; in every way dwell here, victory to Mother Jagadambika
roman: Yahi Mor Ardas, Haath Jod Vinti Karun, Sab Vidhi Karau Suvaas, Jai Janani Jagadambika

hindi: सिन्धु सुता मैं सुमिरौ तोही। ज्ञान, बुद्धि, विद्या दो मोही॥
english: O daughter of the ocean, I remember you; grant me knowledge, wisdom and learning
roman: Sindhu Suta Main Sumirau Tohi, Gyan Buddhi Vidya Do Mohi

hindi: तुम समान नहिं कोई उपकारी। सब विधि पुरवहु आस हमारी॥
english: None is as beneficent as you; fulfil our hopes in every way
roman: Tum Saman Nahin Koi Upkaari, Sab Vidhi Purvahu Aas Hamari

hindi: जय जय जगत जननि जगदम्बा। सबकी तुम ही हो अवलम्बा॥
english: Victory to the mother of the universe, Jagadamba; you alone are the support of all
roman: Jai Jai Jagat Janani Jagdamba, Sabki Tum Hi Ho Avalamba

hindi: तुम ही हो सब घट घट वासी। विनती यही हमारी खासी॥
english: You dwell in every heart; this is our special prayer to you
roman: Tum Hi Ho Sab Ghat Ghat Vaasi, Vinti Yahi Hamari Khaasi

hindi: जगजननी जय सिन्धु कुमारी। दीनन की तुम हो हितकारी॥
english: Victory to the world-mother, daughter of the ocean; you are the benefactress of the humble
roman: Jagjanani Jai Sindhu Kumari, Deenan Ki Tum Ho Hitkaari

hindi: विनवौं नित्य तुमहिं महारानी। कृपा करौ जग जननि भवानी॥
english: Daily I beseech you, O great queen; be gracious, O world-mother Bhavani
roman: Vinavoun Nitya Tumahin Maharani, Kripa Karau Jag Janani Bhavani

hindi: केहि विधि स्तुति करौं तिहारी। सुधि लीजै अपराध बिसारी॥
english: How shall I praise you; forgetting my faults, take care of me
roman: Kehi Vidhi Stuti Karoun Tihari, Sudhi Leejai Apradh Bisari

hindi: कृपा दृष्टि चितवो मम ओरी। जगजननी विनती सुन मोरी॥
english: Cast your gracious glance towards me; O world-mother, hear my prayer
roman: Kripa Drishti Chitavo Mam Ori, Jagjanani Vinti Sun Mori

hindi: ज्ञान बुद्धि जय सुख की दाता। संकट हरो हमारी माता॥
english: Giver of knowledge, wisdom and happiness; remove our troubles, O Mother
roman: Gyan Buddhi Jai Sukh Ki Data, Sankat Haro Hamari Mata

hindi: क्षीरसिन्धु जब विष्णु मथायो। चौदह रत्न सिन्धु में पायो॥
english: When Vishnu churned the ocean of milk; fourteen gems were found in the ocean
roman: Kshirasindhu Jab Vishnu Mathayo, Chaudah Ratna Sindhu Mein Payo

hindi: चौदह रत्न में तुम सुखरासी। सेवा कियो प्रभु बनि दासी॥
english: Among the fourteen gems you are the treasure of joy; you served the Lord as his devotee
roman: Chaudah Ratna Mein Tum Sukhrasi, Seva Kiyo Prabhu Bani Daasi

hindi: जब जब जन्म जहां प्रभु लीन्हा। रुप बदल तहं सेवा कीन्हा॥
english: Wherever and whenever the Lord took birth; you changed your form and served him there
roman: Jab Jab Janm Jahan Prabhu Linha, Roop Badal Tahan Seva Kinha

hindi: स्वयं विष्णु जब नर तनु धारा। लीन्हेउ अवधपुरी अवतारा॥
english: When Vishnu himself took human form; he took avatar in Ayodhya
roman: Svayam Vishnu Jab Nar Tanu Dhara, Linheyu Avadhpuri Avatara

hindi: तब तुम प्रगट जनकपुर माहीं। सेवा कियो हृदय पुलकाहीं॥
english: Then you appeared in Janakpur; you served him with a thrilling heart
roman: Tab Tum Pragat Janakpur Mahin, Seva Kiyo Hriday Pulkaheen

hindi: अपनाया तोहि अन्तर्यामी। विश्व विदित त्रिभुवन की स्वामी॥
english: The inner-knower accepted you; the whole world knows you as mistress of all three worlds
roman: Apnaya Tohi Antaryami, Vishwa Vidit Tribhuvan Ki Swami

hindi: तुम सम प्रबल शक्ति नहीं आनी। कहं लौ महिमा कहौं बखानी॥
english: No power equal to yours has come; how far shall I describe your glory
roman: Tum Sam Prabal Shakti Nahin Aani, Kahan Lau Mahima Kahoun Bakhani

hindi: मन क्रम वचन करै सेवकाई। मन इच्छित वाञ्छित फल पाई॥
english: Whoever serves you in thought, deed and word; receives the desired and wished-for fruit
roman: Man Kram Vachan Karai Sevakai, Man Ichchhit Vanchit Phal Pai

hindi: तजि छल कपट और चतुराई। पूजहिं विविध भांति मन लाई॥
english: Giving up deceit, cunning and cleverness; worship her in many ways with full attention
roman: Taji Chhal Kapat Aur Chaturai, Pujaheen Vividh Bhaanti Man Lai

hindi: और हाल मैं कहौं बुझाई। जो यह पाठ करै मन लाई॥
english: Let me explain further; whoever recites this text with full attention
roman: Aur Haal Main Kahoun Bujhai, Jo Yeh Path Karai Man Lai

hindi: ताकौ कोई कष्ट न होई। मन इच्छित पावै फल सोई॥
english: No trouble comes to them; they receive the fruit their mind desires
roman: Takau Koi Kasht Na Hoi, Man Ichchhit Pavai Phal Soi

hindi: त्राहि त्राहि जय दुःख निवारिणि। त्रिविध ताप भव बन्धन हारिणी॥
english: Save us, save us, victory to the remover of sorrows; destroyer of the three afflictions and bonds of existence
roman: Trahi Trahi Jai Dukh Nivarini, Trividh Tap Bhav Bandhan Harini

hindi: जो चालीसा पढ़ै पढ़ावै। ध्यान लगाकर सुनै सुनावै॥
english: Whoever reads or has this chalisa read; listens or makes others listen with devotion
roman: Jo Chalisa Padhai Padhavai, Dhyan Lagakar Sunai Sunavai

hindi: ताकौ कोई न रोग सतावै। पुत्र आदि धन सम्पत्ति पावै॥
english: No disease troubles them; they gain children, wealth and prosperity
roman: Takau Koi Na Rog Satavai, Putra Aadi Dhan Sampatti Pavai

hindi: पुत्रहीन अरु सम्पति हीना। अन्ध बधिर कोढ़ी अति दीना॥
english: Those without children or wealth; the blind, deaf, leper or very poor
roman: Putrahin Aru Sampati Hina, Andh Badhir Kodhhi Ati Dina

hindi: विप्र बोलाय कै पाठ करावै। शंका दिल में कभी न लावै॥
english: If they invite a brahmin and have the path recited; never letting doubt enter their heart
roman: Vipr Bolay Kai Path Karavai, Shanka Dil Mein Kabhi Na Lavai

hindi: पाठ करावै दिन चालीसा। ता पर कृपा करैं गौरीसा॥
english: If they have it recited for forty days; Gaureshwara (Shiva-Lakshmi) showers grace on them
roman: Path Karavai Din Chalisa, Ta Par Kripa Karen Gaurisha

hindi: सुख सम्पत्ति बहुत सी पावै। कमी नहीं काहू की आवै॥
english: They attain much happiness and prosperity; no lack comes to anyone
roman: Sukh Sampatti Bahut Si Pavai, Kami Nahin Kahu Ki Avai

hindi: बारह मास करै जो पूजा। तेहि सम धन्य और नहिं दूजा॥
english: Whoever worships for twelve months; none is more blessed than them
roman: Barah Maas Karai Jo Puja, Tehi Sam Dhanya Aur Nahin Duja

hindi: प्रतिदिन पाठ करै मन माही। उन सम कोइ जग में कहुं नाहीं॥
english: Whoever recites daily in their heart; none in the world compares to them
roman: Pratidin Path Karai Man Mahi, Un Sam Koi Jag Mein Kahun Nahi

hindi: बहुविधि क्या मैं करौं बड़ाई। लेय परीक्षा ध्यान लगाई॥
english: How many ways shall I sing your glory; test it yourself with full attention
roman: Bahuviddhi Kya Main Karoun Badai, Ley Pariksha Dhyan Lagai

hindi: करि विश्वास करै व्रत नेमा। होय सिद्ध उपजै उर प्रेमा॥
english: With full faith, observe the vow and practice; success comes and love blooms in the heart
roman: Kari Vishvaas Karai Vrat Nema, Hoy Siddh Upjai Ur Prema

hindi: जय जय जय लक्ष्मी भवानी। सब में व्यापित हो गुण खानी॥
english: Victory, victory, victory to Lakshmi Bhavani; you pervade all, mine of virtues
roman: Jai Jai Jai Lakshmi Bhavani, Sab Mein Vyapit Ho Gun Khani

hindi: तुम्हरो तेज प्रबल जग माहीं। तुम सम कोउ दयालु कहुं नाहिं॥
english: Your power is mighty in the world; none anywhere is as compassionate as you
roman: Tumharo Tej Prabal Jag Mahi, Tum Sam Kou Dayalu Kahun Nahin

hindi: मोहि अनाथ की सुधि अब लीजै। संकट काटि भक्ति मोहि दीजै॥
english: Now take care of me who am helpless; cut away my troubles and grant me devotion
roman: Mohi Anath Ki Sudhi Ab Leejai, Sankat Kaati Bhakti Mohi Deejai

hindi: भूल चूक करि क्षमा हमारी। दर्शन दीजै दशा निहारी॥
english: Forgive our mistakes and errors; grant your darshan seeing our condition
roman: Bhool Chook Kari Kshama Hamari, Darshan Deejai Dasha Nihhari

hindi: बिन दर्शन व्याकुल अधिकारी। तुमहि अछत दुःख सहते भारी॥
english: Without your darshan devotees are restless; even in your presence they bear heavy sorrow
roman: Bin Darshan Vyakul Adhikaari, Tumahi Achhat Dukh Sahte Bhari

hindi: नहिं मोहिं ज्ञान बुद्धि है तन में। सब जानत हो अपने मन में॥
english: I have no knowledge or wisdom in me; you know everything in your own mind
roman: Nahin Mohin Gyan Buddhi Hai Tan Mein, Sab Janat Ho Apne Man Mein

hindi: रुप चतुर्भुज करके धारण। कष्ट मोर अब करहु निवारण॥
english: Assuming your four-armed form; now remove my troubles
roman: Roop Chaturbhuj Karke Dharan, Kasht Mor Ab Karahu Nivaran

hindi: केहि प्रकार मैं करौं बड़ाई। ज्ञान बुद्धि मोहि नहिं अधिकाई॥
english: How shall I praise you; I have no authority in knowledge and wisdom
roman: Kehi Prakar Main Karoun Badai, Gyan Buddhi Mohi Nahin Adhikai

hindi: रामदास अब कहयि पुकारी। करो दूर तुम विपति हमारी॥
english: Ramdas now calls out to you; remove our misfortune
roman: Ramdas Ab Kahyi Pukari, Karo Door Tum Vipati Hamari

hindi: त्राहि त्राहि दुःख हारिणी, हरो वेगि सब त्रास। जयति जयति जय लक्ष्मी, करो शत्रु को नाश॥
english: Save us, save us, O remover of sorrow, quickly remove all fear; victory, victory, victory to Lakshmi, destroy the enemies
roman: Trahi Trahi Dukh Harini, Haro Vegi Sab Tras, Jayati Jayati Jai Lakshmi, Karo Shatru Ko Nash

hindi: रामदास धरि ध्यान नित, विनय करत कर जोर। मातु लक्ष्मी दास पर, करहु दया की कोर॥
english: Ramdas always meditating, making supplication with folded hands; O Mother Lakshmi, on your servant, shower the edge of your mercy
roman: Ramdas Dhari Dhyan Nit, Vinay Karat Kar Jor, Matu Lakshmi Das Par, Karahu Daya Ki Kor
